issues.description: Trigger 'Trigger' is not valid for Blocker keyword. Blocker should use 'OnAttacked' trigger to activate when opponent declares an attack.
Condition 'HasCardOnBoard' with name 'Monkey D. Luffy' is incorrect. Blocker has no deck-building requirements; this condition should not exist.
Action 'PlaySelf' is incorrect. Blocker effect should 'Rest' this card to redirect the attack, not play it.

The entire DSL misrepresents the Blocker keyword. Blocker is a static ability that allows you to rest this card to become the new attack target—it should be a simple mechanic, not a conditional trigger-action chain.
